rule: Agent 1 Planner must use GSD discipline
required_action: Run GSD checks, create PLAN.md, define acceptance criteria, write STATE.json
forbidden_action: Skip planning documentation or proceed without bounded scope

rule: Agent 3 Reviewer must use GSD discipline
required_action: Run GSD checks, verify source/runtime truth, run independent validation
forbidden_action: Approve without independent validation or skip runtime proof

rule: Agent 3 must verify fresh :5180 runtime for UI/runtime work
condition: When reviewing frontend or runtime contours
required_action: curl -I http://clearvestnic.ru:5180 and confirm HTTP 200 with no-cache headers
forbidden_action: Review UI/runtime contour without verifying the runtime is actually serving

rule: Agent 3 must test the exact user scenario
condition: When reviewing bug fix or feature contour
required_action: Reproduce the exact steps described in the contour PLAN.md acceptance criteria
forbidden_action: Substitute a different scenario or skip the exact reproduction steps

rule: Diagram performance review must test real mouse drag, not only programmatic zoom/click
required_action: Perform actual pointer drag on the BPMN canvas and observe jank/frame drops
forbidden_action: Approve based only on synthetic zoom, click, or programmatic tests without real drag

rule: No PR, merge, or deploy without explicit user command
required_action: Wait for explicit user approval before git push, PR creation, or deploy
forbidden_action: Create PR, merge, push, or deploy without explicit user request

rule: No product runtime code changes in RAG tooling contours
required_action: Keep changes under tools/rag/, docs/rag/, .planning/contours/ only
forbidden_action: Modify frontend/src/, backend/app/, or any product runtime file during RAG work

required_action: Treat RAG results as suggestions, warnings, and references only
forbidden_action: Auto-mutate code, auto-save files, write BPMN XML, or apply Product Actions automatically based on RAG output
